history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right. The cell directly ahead (column C) is lava, so I cannot move forward. To proceed, I need to go down towards row 6, then across to column H, and then down to the goal at row 8 column H. Turning right will make me face down, allowing me to move down into safe cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 03 column B) is floor, while the cell to the right (row 02 column C) is lava. So moving forward is safe and progresses toward the open area below.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down. The cell directly in front (row 04, column B) is a floor ('.'), which is safe. My goal is at row 08, column H. I plan to move down to row 06, then move right to column H, then move down to the goal. So first step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row4 column B facing down. The goal is at row8 column H. I can move down safely to row5 column B (floor), then continue down to row6, then move right along row6 to column H, then down to goal. The cell in front is floor, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (5, B) facing down. I need to reach the goal at (8, H). The path: first move down to (6, B) (safe floor), then move right across row6 to column H, then move down to (8, H). So the immediate next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (6,B) facing down. The goal is at (8,H). To reach it, I need to go east along row6 to column H, then go south to row8. I cannot move forward because the cell below is lava. I will turn left to face east (right).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (row 06, column B) facing right (east). The goal is at (row 08, column H). The path ahead along row 6 is clear of obstacles (all floors), and then I need to go south. The immediate cell to the east (6,C) is a floor, so I can safely move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row6 column C facing right. The goal is at row8 column H. I can move east along row6 to column H, which is safe. Then I will turn right to face down and move down to the goal. My next action is to move forward to row6 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column D, facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. I can move forward to row 6, column E, which is a floor cell. I'll continue moving right until I reach the column H, then turn down and move to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (row6, colE) facing east. The goal is at (row8, colH). The cell directly east (row6, colF) is floor, so I can move forward safely. I will proceed east along row6 to reach colH, then turn south and go down to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row06 column F facing right. The goal is at row08 column H. I can move forward to (6,G) which is safe. Then I can continue to (6,H) and then turn right to face down to go to (7,H) and then (8,H) goal. So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column G, facing right. The cell directly ahead (to the east) is (6, H), which is a safe floor cell. The goal is at (8, H), so I need to move east first to align with the column, then turn south. I will move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. I need to move down two cells. The cell directly below (row 07 column H) is safe floor, and then the goal is at row 08 column H. So I should first turn right to face downwards.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>I am at row 06 column H facing down. The goal is directly below at row 08 column H. The cell in front of me (row 07 column H) is a floor cell, so I can move forward safely.</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 07 column H, facing down (v). The goal is directly below me at row 08 column H. I can move forward one step to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
